promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next existing intake batch in folder order after the archived read-log reduction.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the pack's packaging role, triad contents, continuation motive, and stale metadata boundaries in a very compact form.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The archived boot, system-spec, and working-context A2-mid batches were used because the readme explicitly points into that triad and compresses those neighboring surfaces into a tiny continuation bundle marker.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until this smaller adjacent packaging marker was reduced into a compact reusable continuation-bundle packet.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The archived export-pack-readme parent batch plus the neighboring boot, system-spec, and working-context A2-mid anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable packaging, topology, and continuation packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: ARCHIVED_EXPORT_PACK_README_NONAUTHORITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the source as packaging history without letting its metadata act as doctrine.

candidate_items.name: BRAIN_SPEC_BOOT_TRIAD_PACKAGING_MARKER
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the pack's clearest topology signal as one historical continuation-kit composition.

candidate_items.name: CLEAN_THREAD_CONTINUATION_BUNDLE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the archived continuation pattern without treating it as an exclusive current restart mode.

candidate_items.name: MINIMAL_CARRY_SET_AS_TIME_BOUNDED_TOPOLOGY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the minimal kit as a historical topology rather than a standing interface claim.

candidate_items.name: DUPLICATION_AVOIDANCE_MOTIVE_CLASSIFICATION_PACKET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the duplication-avoidance motive as archived packaging history without letting it outrank later transport tightening.

candidate_items.name: PACK_README_REQUIRES_NEIGHBOR_SURFACE_DETAIL_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest guard against over-trusting the tiny README without the neighboring surfaces it names.

quarantined_items.name: GPT_5_2_PRO_AS_CURRENT_MODEL_REQUIREMENT_OR_AUTHORITY_SIGNAL
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The model line is stale packaging metadata rather than current authority or requirement.

quarantined_items.name: COMPACT_TRIAD_AS_CURRENT_EXHAUSTIVE_A2_CARRY_SET

quarantined_items.name: DUPLICATION_AVOIDANCE_AS_CURRENT_TRANSPORT_POLICY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The older duplication-avoidance motive does not fully define current transport policy.

quarantined_items.name: PACKAGING_README_AS_SUBSTANTIVE_SYSTEM_SPEC

quarantined_items.name: EXPORT_PACK_CONTINUATION_AS_ONLY_VALID_RESTART_MODE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The archived export-pack continuation pattern is one historical restart mode, not an exclusive present requirement.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the strongest continuation-packaging packets in the parent batch: the triad marker, the clean-thread continuation motive, the time-bounded minimal-kit topology, and the neighbor-surface dependence rule.
They preserve the README as packaging history without letting stale model metadata or old transport motives self-authorize into doctrine.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later archived-state synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain stale-metadata overreads, transport-policy overreads, or tiny-readme doctrine overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the archived boot, system-spec, and working-context A2-mid batches as neighboring triad anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded archived export-pack reduction pass.
